name: IASRI Scholarship For M.Sc And Ph.D
benefit_description: Institute Scholarships / Fellowships Scholarships are offered to all admitted students. An M.Sc. student is granted a scholarship/fellowship of value Rs.7,500/- p.m. In addition to this, M.Sc. students have a contingent grant of Rs.6,000/- per annum, for meeting out the expenditure on study tours, e
details: The Indian Agricultural Statistics Research Institute is a premier Institute under Indian Council of Agricultural Research for conducting research and education in the field of agricultural statistics and computer application in agriculture. The Institute has functioned as the Centre of Advanced Studies in Agricultural Statistics and Computer Application from October 12,1983 to March 31,1992 under the aegis of United Nations Development Programme.
